name: Amazon sellers processing 50–100 orders/month tool
description: For Amazon sellers processing 50–100 orders/month, inaccurate inventory levels cause stockouts. We provide automated reorder alerts instead of manual tracking.
problem_solved: Inability to maintain optimal inventory levels, leading to stockouts and lost sales.
features: View inventory levels in a dashboard

locked_fields.primary_problem: Inability to maintain optimal inventory levels, leading to stockouts and lost sales.
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For Amazon sellers processing 50–100 orders/month, inaccurate inventory levels cause stockouts. We provide automated reorder alerts instead of manual tracking.
locked_fields.current_alternative: Manual tracking of inventory levels using spreadsheets.
must_have_features: View inventory levels in a dashboard

one_liner: For Amazon sellers processing 50–100 orders/month, inaccurate inventory levels cause stockouts. We provide automated reorder alerts instead of manual tracking.
